mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pipeline_execution (id, ticket_id, status, started_at, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{ticketId}, #{status}, #{startedAt}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, ticket_id, status, started_at, completed_at, error_message, created_at FROM pipeline_execution WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, ticket_id, status, started_at, completed_at, error_message, created_at FROM pipeline_execution WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
